chunk_map.heading: How this training was built (H1 + lede)
Wrong is how steering gets in
The rules started doing the work
Then the agents started checking the agents
You just ran the compound loop

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Referent resolution under a sequential deck read.
rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 1 line 7 opener "The thirty bulletpoints became module prototypes, and all of them were wrong" — "the thirty bulletpoints" is a chunk-0 lede noun reused later (chunk 0 line 3: "A strategy doc, seven headings, thirty bullets"), the compendium's own explicit NOT-a-violation example format. chunk 4 lines 27-30 ("the shape you just ran on your own repo", "You let Claude read your repo, saw the wrongness", "The retro you just ran") resolve under the module-arc-beats-in-closers carve-out — this lecture is the module's final closer, placed directly after the exercise sequence (compound-and-close).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every backward reference points at a beat that exists.
rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 4 line 30: "The retro you just ran was step four of his loop" — compound-and-close's retro beat is confirmed to carry the Klaassen citation per this file's own maintainer Frameworks note ("Removes the prior gamble where Klaassen's name lived only in the retro prompt"); the referenced beat exists.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Live-demo beats survive a text read.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Checked sub-items: 'Not X. Not Y. Z.' construction — chunk 1 line 7 has a single 'Not wrong the way... Wrong the way...' pair, not the banned two-negation-plus-affirmation triple. Anaphora/epistrophe triples — chunk 3 line 23 ('Every session inherited... Every session got better...') is a two-leg form, not the banned triple. Self-grading superlatives — none. Number + own retraction — none (no bare numeric claims present). Abstraction-noun stacks — none matching the banned pattern. Verb triplets with an empty leg — none.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Internal dialect never lands on a slide.
rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 2 line 15 uses 'subagent' — maintainer-attested carve-out: this file's own maintainer Register-check block states technical terms including 'subagent' are acceptable for AE101's engineer register (Agents 101 business-audience ban does not apply). Not a violation.
